---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- What user-facing or operator-facing problem are you trying to solve? Start with the problem, not the solution. -->

## Who's affected

<!-- Who hits this? Self-hosters with many tenants? Solo users? Operators tuning costs? Give us a concrete picture. -->

## What you've tried (if applicable)

<!-- Workarounds you're using today, why they fall short, alternative tools you've considered. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see? Rough sketch is fine — you don't need a full design. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- How will we know this is done? "Setting X persists across reloads" / "Reply latency drops below 3s for the 95th percentile" / etc. -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What this feature deliberately does NOT do, so we stay focused. -->

---

Before submitting, please check:

- [ ] I've searched existing open + closed issues for a similar request.
- [ ] I've checked [docs/FEATURES.md](../../docs/FEATURES.md) — is this already on the roadmap?
- [ ] I've read [CLAUDE.md "Things to NOT reintroduce"](../../CLAUDE.md#things-to-not-reintroduce) — this isn't one of them.
